rooms.name: Dungeon Entrance
rooms.description: A dimly lit stone corridor. Torches flicker on the walls. The air smells of damp earth and old iron.

rooms.name: Goblin Den
rooms.description: A filthy cave littered with bones. A goblin snarls at you from the shadows!

rooms.name: Merchant's Alcove
rooms.description: A small room with a makeshift stall. A weathered merchant sits behind a pile of wares.

rooms.name: Hidden Chamber
rooms.description: Behind a crumbling wall, you find a small room with a dusty treasure chest.

rooms.name: Abandoned Camp
rooms.description: An old campsite with a bedroll and cold fire pit. You could rest here.

rooms.name: Skeleton Crypt
rooms.description: Coffins line the walls. A skeleton warrior rises from its eternal slumber!

rooms.name: Dragon's Lair
rooms.description: A vast cavern filled with heat. A massive dragon blocks the exit to the next floor!
